sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS OR A NUMBER.
Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: What does the charity Forward thinking do?
options: A it funds art exhibitions in hospitals
B it produces affordable materials for art therapy
C it encourages the use of arts projects in healthcare

questions.content: What benefit of Forward thinking’s work does Jasmine mention?
options: A people avoid going to hospital
C medical students do better in tests

questions.content: When did the organization become known as Forward thinking?

options: B in all parts of London
C in several towns and villages near Clifton

questions.content: Jasmine explains that the Colville Centre is
options: A a school for people with health problems
B a venue for a range of different activities
C a building which needs repairing
